_meta.provenance: Extracted from Khelo_Bharat_Visual_Blueprint.html (concept work). Access levels are Proposed and require government confirmation.

userGroups.name: MYAS / National Sports Board
userGroups.uses: National command view: talent, funds, infrastructure, federation compliance, state rankings.
userGroups.proposedAccess: Full national dashboards; policy and approval actions; no direct edit of athlete data.

userGroups.name: SAI (HQ, Regional Centres, NCOEs, STCs)
userGroups.uses: Run schemes, camps and assessments; manage centres, coaches and assets.
userGroups.proposedAccess: Scheme workflows, centre and asset management, assessment data entry.

userGroups.name: State Sports Departments / SPOCs
userGroups.uses: State dashboards, scheme processing, facility updates, district monitoring.

userGroups.name: District Sports Officers (DSOs) & District Education Officers (DEOs)
userGroups.uses: Run screening games, verify school data, first-level approvals, facility inspection.

userGroups.name: PT Teachers
userGroups.uses: Register students, conduct standard tests, upload scores and videos, earn scout recognition.
userGroups.proposedAccess: School-scoped capture via offline-first School App.

userGroups.name: Athletes & guardians
userGroups.uses: Own their profile; apply to schemes, events and jobs; use the sports card; control consent.

userGroups.name: Coaches, physios, experts, officials
userGroups.uses: Verified profiles, assignments, scheme applications, certification renewals.
userGroups.proposedAccess: Own-profile management; assigned-athlete views per consent.

userGroups.name: National Sports Federations (NSFs)
userGroups.uses: Compliance filings, athlete verification, event sanctioning, results, selections.
userGroups.proposedAccess: Federation-scoped filings, sanctioning and results workflows.

userGroups.name: Schools, colleges, academies
userGroups.uses: Register talent, host screening games, request facility linkage.

userGroups.name: CSR corporates & donors
userGroups.uses: Browse verified needs, fund projects, track impact publicly.
userGroups.proposedAccess: Need bank browsing, funding workflows, public impact views.

userGroups.name: Banks / NPCI / benefit partners
userGroups.uses: Issue sports cards, honour benefits, settle discounts.
userGroups.proposedAccess: Card verification API, benefit settlement views.

userGroups.name: Public
userGroups.uses: Open dashboards, laurels, stories, event calendar, federation status.
userGroups.proposedAccess: Read-only public views; aggregates only for minors.
